mapper.select:
SELECT '16' CODE_COMPANY --회사코드 , BB.PROJECT_CD CODE_PROJECT --프로젝트코드 , TO_CHAR(BB.PROJECT_SQ) CHASU_RE_SAUP_VAL --재사업발의차수 , EC.CONT_NUM NO_CONTRACT --계약번호 , EC.CONT_DESC NM_CONTRACT --계약명 , BB.IRS_NUM CODE_CUST_CONTRACT --계약거래처 , '' GBN_GEORAE_CONTRACT --계약거래구분 공통코드 (CODE-AC-724)
, CASE WHEN BB.PURCHASE_TYPE = 'S' THEN '010' WHEN BB.PURCHASE_TYPE = 'G' THEN '020' WHEN BB.PURCHASE_TYPE = 'M' THEN '060' WHEN BB.PURCHASE_TYPE = 'C' THEN '080' WHEN BB.PURCHASE_TYPE = 'L' THEN '090' END CODE_CONTRACT_TYPE --계약형태 공통코드 (CODE-AC-725) , CASE WHEN BB.VENDOR_OPEN_TYPE = 'PC' THEN '010' WHEN BB.VENDOR_OPEN_TYPE = 'LC' THEN '020' WHEN BB.VENDOR_OPEN_TYPE = 'NC' THEN '030' WHEN BB.VENDOR_OPEN_TYPE = 'GC' THEN '040' END CODE_CONTRACT_METHOD --계약방법 공통코드 (CODE-AC-726) , CASE WHEN EC.AMT_TYPE = 'TA' THEN '1' WHEN EC.AMT_TYPE = 'UP' THEN '2' END CODE_CONTRACT_AMT --계약금액구분 공통코드 (CODE-AC-729)
, TO_CHAR(EC.CONT_AMT) AMT_CONTRACT --계약금액 , TO_CHAR(EC.CONT_AMT+NVL(EC.VAT_AMT,0)) AMT_CONTRACT_VAT --계약금액_부가세포함
, TO_CHAR(EC.CONT_DATE,'YYYYMMDD') DT_CONTRACT --계약체결일 , EC.CONT_USER_ID ID_CHARGE_CONTRACT --계약담당자ID , TO_CHAR(EC.CONT_START_DATE,'YYYYMMDD') DT_CONTRACT_ST --계약시작일 , TO_CHAR(EC.CONT_END_DATE,'YYYYMMDD') DT_CONTRACT_ED --계약종료일
, TO_CHAR(EC.CONT_END_DATE + 1,'YYYYMMDD') DT_FIXDEFECT_ST --하자보수시작일 , TO_CHAR(EC.CONT_END_DATE + 1,'YYYYMMDD') DT_FIXDEFECT_ED --하자보수종료일
--, EC.WARR_GUAR_PERCENT RATE_FIXDEFECT --하자보수율 , TO_CHAR(NVL(EC.DELAY_NUME_RATE / EC.DELAY_DENO_RATE ,0)) RATE_DELAY --지체상금율 , EC.DELAY_RMK NOTE_DELAY --지체상금내용 , TO_CHAR(BB.FC_MNT_TERM) AS_MONTH --무상유지보수기간 , '' AS_START_COND --무상유지보수시작조건 , EC.VENDOR_PIC_USER_NM NM_CHARGE_PHASE --매입담당자명 , EC.VENDOR_PIC_USER_CELL_NUM NO_MOBILE --연락처 , EC.VENDOR_PIC_USER_EMAIL EMAIL_ADDR --이메일 , '' ID_SEUNGIN --승인자ID , '1' STATUS --결재상태(CODE_US_077) , '' DTM_SEUNGIN --승인일시 , '' NOTE_ETC --기타내용 , '' SAYU_RETURN --반려사유 , '' CODE_PROJECT_PRE --전프로젝트코드 , '1' CODE_STATUS_LED --원장상태코드(CODE_AC_730) , EC.REG_USER_ID ID_REG --등록자 , TO_CHAR(EC.REG_DATE) DTM_REG --등록일시 , EC.MOD_USER_ID ID_UPT --수정자 , TO_CHAR(EC.MOD_DATE) DTM_UPT --수정일시 , null AMT_EST --추정금액 , null AMT_EST_VAT --추정금액_부가세포함 , '' GBN_MANAGE_CONTRACT --계약관리구분(CODE_AC_738)
, CASE WHEN BB.SUBMIT_TYPE = 'LP' THEN '1' WHEN BB.SUBMIT_TYPE = 'NE' THEN '2' END CODE_BID_METHOD --낙찰자결정방법(CODE_AC_739)
, '' RATE_DC_CONTRACT --계약할인율 , BB.PROJECT_TYPE CODE_PROJECT_TP --프로젝트유형코드 , null CODE_OUTPUT_WAY --산출방법코드 , null DTM_CHG --계약변경(거래처, 계약일, 금액) 발생일자 , null DTM_FIX --담당자 확정일자 , null ID_FIX --확정 담당자 FROM STOCECCT EC JOIN ( SELECT PH.PROJECT_CD ,PH.PROJECT_SQ ,EM.PURCHASE_TYPE ,PD.VENDOR_OPEN_TYPE ,EM.FC_MNT_TERM ,PD.SUBMIT_TYPE ,PH.PROJECT_TYPE ,(SELECT IRS_NO FROM STOCVNGL WHERE GATE_CD=EM.GATE_CD AND VENDOR_CD=EM.VENDOR_CD) IRS_NUM FROM STOCECMT EM JOIN STOCPRDT PD ON EM.GATE_CD = PD.GATE_CD AND EM.PB_BUYER_CD = PD.BUYER_CD AND EM.PR_NUM = PD.PR_NUM AND EM.PR_SQ = PD.PR_SQ JOIN STOCPRHD PH ON PH.GATE_CD = PD.GATE_CD AND PH.BUYER_CD = PD.BUYER_CD AND PH.PR_NUM = PD.PR_NUM WHERE EM.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND EM.BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND EM.CONT_NUM = #{CONT_NUM} AND EM.CONT_CNT = #{CONT_CNT} AND EM.DEL_FLAG = '0' AND PD.DEL_FLAG = '0' AND PH.PROJECT_CD IS NOT NULL --추가 AND PH.PROJECT_SQ IS NOT NULL --추가 AND PH.SIGN_STATUS = 'E' --추가 AND EM.PB_BUYER_CD||EM.PR_NUM||EM.PR_SQ = ( SELECT MAX(EM1.PB_BUYER_CD||EM1.PR_NUM||EM1.PR_SQ) FROM STOCECMT EM1 JOIN STOCPRDT PD1 ON EM1.GATE_CD = PD1.GATE_CD AND EM1.PB_BUYER_CD = PD1.BUYER_CD AND EM1.PR_NUM = PD1.PR_NUM AND EM1.PR_SQ = PD1.PR_SQ WHERE EM1.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND EM1.BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND EM1.CONT_NUM = #{CONT_NUM} AND EM1.CONT_CNT = #{CONT_CNT} AND EM1.DEL_FLAG = '0' AND PD1.DEL_FLAG = '0' ) AND ROWNUM = 1 ) BB ON 1 = 1 WHERE EC.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND EC.BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND EC.CONT_NUM = #{CONT_NUM} AND EC.CONT_CNT = #{CONT_CNT} AND EC.PROGRESS_CD = '4300' --추가
